subject: .agents/skills/gds-coached-dev-story
verdict: Excellent: all actionable analysis findings have been resolved.
summary: The workflow now declares how its internal resources resolve and directs users to the correct customization override files. It retains its central strength: a formal story lifecycle with explicit human control, tested review checkpoints, and evidence-gated progress.
strengths: Internal paths and runtime placeholders now have an explicit resolution contract.
Customization remains small and uses the same override convention as sibling GDS workflows.
The explicit mode table, review gate, and test-before-completion rules preserve coached implementation rather than autonomous delivery.
SKILL.md passes structural validation and remains below the desired token threshold.

journeys.name: Coached implementation
journeys.steps: Story intake -> smallest incomplete unit -> explicit mode -> tested review checkpoint -> evidence-gated completion -> explicit story finalization.

experience.headless: Fundamentally interactive by design: the workflow's value depends on explicit user mode selection and approval gates.
